# Market Orca - Financial News & Market Intelligence

## Overview
Market Orca is a free real-time financial news aggregator and AI-powered market intelligence platform. It covers Indonesia stocks (IHSG/IDX/BEI), forex, and cryptocurrency.

## Key Features
- Real-time news aggregation from trusted Indonesian sources
- IHSG (JCI) stock market data and analysis
- Forex rate tracking (USD/IDR, EUR/IDR, GBP/IDR)
- AI-powered market intelligence (MCP server)
- Color-coded news tags: 🔴 Red Flag, 🟢 Worth Knowing, 🟡 Model Wars, 🔵 Breaking

## API Endpoints

### Market Data
- **GET /api/overview** - Get overall market overview data
  - Response: JSON with market summary, indices, top movers
- **GET /api/stock/{symbol}** - Get individual stock data
  - Parameters: `{symbol}` - Stock symbol (e.g., BBCA.JK, AAPL)
  - Response: JSON with price, change, history, news
- **GET /api/news** - Get latest financial news feed
  - Query params: `limit` (default 20), `offset` (default 0), `tag` (red, green, yellow, blue)
  - Response: JSON array of news articles with title, source, url, summary, tag, timestamp
- **GET /api/news/enrich** - Get enriched news with sentiment analysis
  - Query params: `limit` (default 20)
  - Response: JSON array with sentiment scores and summaries
- **GET /api/reports** - Get list of available AI reports
  - Response: JSON array of report slugs/metadata
- **GET /api/report/{slug}** - Get specific AI report
  - Response: JSON with full report content

### Health & Status
- **GET /health** - Service health check
  - Response: JSON `{status: "ok", timestamp, uptime, dbSize, version}`

## MCP Server (Model Context Protocol)
- **Endpoint**: https://mcp.anomali.web.id/
- **Protocol**: Model Context Protocol (MCP) StreamableHTTP
- **Auth**: Bearer token required
- **Tools available**: market overview, stock data, news feed, AI reports, RAG search, web search, alert management, watchlist management

## Search
- **Search engine**: https://searxng.anomali.web.id/
- **Instance name**: AROXNG
- Supports: general web search, news search, file search, science, maps, images, videos, music, IT, social media

## Additional Endpoints (Internal)
- **GET /api/assets** - List all tracked assets
- **GET /api/assets/{slug}** - Get specific asset details
- **GET /api/watchlist** - Get user watchlist (auth required)
- **POST /api/watchlist** - Add to watchlist (auth required)
- **DELETE /api/watchlist/{id}** - Remove from watchlist (auth required)
- **GET /api/alerts** - Get configured alerts
- **POST /api/alerts** - Create alert (auth required)
- **GET /api/discord-settings** - Get Discord bot settings (auth required)
- **GET /api/report-preferences** - Get user report preferences (auth required)

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Vue 3.5 + Vite 7.1
- Backend: Node.js + Express (ESM)
- Database: SQLite (WAL mode)
- Authentication: Session-based
- Hosting: anomali.web.id domains

## Contact & Support
- Dashboard: https://market-orca.anomali.web.id
- Report: https://report.anomali.web.id
- Domain: anomali.web.id
